## Walmart Stock Flagged Above Fair Value While Earnings Outlook Appears Fair

No material signal for a tech-focused PM; WMT's elevated valuation versus fair earnings is relevant only as a read on consumer discretionary sentiment and retail AI adoption pacing.

- Earnings outlook described as reasonable rather than stretched.
